meta.name: Vector Databases & RAG Infrastructure Almanac Roster
meta.research_method: 8-facet wide exploration, 112+ independent searches, 8 parallel agents

tools.name: Pinecone
tools.notes: Market leader (~28% share); zero-ops serverless; $0.033/hr; sub-50ms p99 at billion scale

tools.name: Qdrant
tools.notes: ~22K stars; Rust-based; self-host + cloud; ACORN filtered HNSW; $50M Series B (Mar 2026)

tools.name: Weaviate
tools.notes: ~12K stars; hybrid search (BM25+vector); multimodal; GraphQL; Engram memory layer

tools.name: Milvus
tools.notes: ~42K stars; billion-scale; GPU accel; K8s-native; Zilliz Cloud = managed

tools.name: Chroma
tools.notes: ~16K stars; developer experience; pip install; Rust rewrite 4x faster; Context-1 agentic search

tools.name: pgvector
tools.notes: ~13-20K stars; HNSW + IVFFlat; pgvectorscale adds StreamingDiskANN; up to 5-10M vectors

tools.name: Zilliz / Vector Lakebase
tools.notes: 100B+ scale; lake-native; S3-based Vortex format; on-demand compute; Cardinal engine 10x

tools.name: Turbopuffer
tools.notes: Object-storage-first; no namespace limits; 10-100x cheaper at rest; native BM25

tools.name: Vorkath
tools.notes: Bare-metal NVMe; $1/mo for 1M vec/1M q; no cold starts; Vamana graph in RAM

tools.name: LanceDB
tools.notes: ~5K stars; edge, local-first; zero-copy columnar; no server required; Cloud in beta

tools.name: Elasticsearch / ESRE
tools.notes: ~30K+ stars; enterprise search; GPU accel in v3.0; re-added AGPL 2024

tools.name: OpenSearch
tools.notes: ~9.5K stars; AWS alternative; GPU-accelerated indexing v3.0; gRPC + MCP

tools.name: Redis Vector
tools.notes: Sub-ms latency; caching; memory-bound; Redis Enterprise Cloud

tools.name: MongoDB Atlas Vector Search
tools.notes: Vectors as native field; not for pure vector; Atlas $5K-70K/year

tools.name: SingleStore
tools.notes: Real-time analytics + AI; trillion-row/sec claims; opaque pricing

tools.name: DataStax Astra (Cassandra)
tools.notes: Real-time updates; immediate consistency; Cassandra 5.0 native vector + SAI

tools.name: Marqo
tools.notes: ~2K stars; multimodal (text+image+video); built-in embedding; $5.2M seed

tools.name: ClickHouse
tools.notes: ~46K stars; analytics + vector search; native vector search functions

tools.name: DuckDB
tools.notes: ~36K stars; embedded analytics + vector; integrated vector similarity search

tools.name: Oracle AI Database 26ai
tools.notes: Unified Hybrid Vector Search; vectors + relational + JSON + graph in one query

tools.name: Apache Cassandra 5.0
tools.notes: AI-driven similarity search; vector data type + Storage-Attached Indexes

tools.name: Vald
tools.notes: Cloud-native; billion-scale ANN; auto-indexing, backup, horizontal scaling

tools.name: Cloudflare Vectorize
tools.notes: Workers ecosystem; 50K namespaces; 5M vector cap; auto-RAG; no hybrid search

tools.name: Turso / sqlite-vec
tools.notes: Per-user vector isolation; SQLite with DiskANN; embedded replicas; $5/mo for 25M queries

tools.name: Vespa
tools.notes: Real-time, hybrid AI search; Yahoo, Spotify; strong ranking + vector

tools.name: FAISS
tools.notes: ~39K stars; GPU-accelerated billion-scale; Meta; IVF, HNSW, RaBitQ; cuVS GPU

tools.name: ScaNN
tools.notes: ~31.5K stars; Google-scale inner product; SOAR algorithm; dynamic updates v1.3.0

tools.name: HNSWlib
tools.notes: ~7K stars; lightweight CPU HNSW; header-only C++; no GPU; 15+ mo since last release

tools.name: DiskANN
tools.notes: ~2K stars; billion-scale SSD-backed; memory-efficient; used by pgvectorscale, Turso

tools.name: USearch
tools.notes: ~4K stars; SIMD-optimized vector search; fast index builds; cross-language bindings

tools.name: LangChain / LangGraph
tools.notes: ~90K+ combined; chain orchestration; 100+ LLM integrations; MCP support

tools.name: LlamaIndex
tools.notes: ~40K+ stars; document indexing; retrieval optimization; hierarchical chunking; hybrid index

tools.name: Haystack
tools.notes: Modular search pipelines; enterprise search + LLM integration; deepset Cloud

tools.name: Ragas
tools.notes: Most-cited; reference-free RAG evaluation; faithfulness, relevancy, precision, recall

tools.name: TruLens
tools.notes: ~3.2K stars; production tracing + RAG triad; inline eval; feedback functions

tools.name: DeepEval
tools.notes: Unit-test-style CI evaluation; pytest integration; agentic eval support

tools.name: Braintrust
tools.notes: Production standard; production-to-evaluation feedback; Brainstore 80x query perf

tools.name: LangSmith
tools.notes: LangChain ecosystem; dataset-driven regression eval; experiment comparison

tools.name: Firecrawl
tools.notes: API-first web+PDF → Markdown; Rust-based PDF engine; MCP server; RAG-ready

tools.name: LlamaParse
tools.notes: Agentic OCR for RAG; 90+ formats; 10K free credits/mo; premium GPT-4V mode

tools.name: Unstructured
tools.notes: 25+ format semantic extraction; element-typed output; hi_res GPU strategy; $1/1K pages

tools.name: Docling (IBM)
tools.notes: 61K stars; open-source layout parser; MCP server; LangChain/LlamaIndex integration

tools.name: Reducto
tools.notes: Agentic OCR correction; ~20% higher accuracy; SOC 2/HIPAA; on-prem; ~$0.03/page

tools.name: LandingAI ADE
tools.notes: Regulated industries; visual grounding; DPT-2; 99.16% DocVQA (self-reported); $0.03/page

tools.name: Mistral OCR 3
tools.notes: VLM-based document understanding; page-image → structured output; flexible but slower

tools.name: Marker-PDF
tools.notes: 36K stars; GPU-accelerated layout-perfect Markdown; multi-format PDF/PPTX/DOCX/EPUB

tools.name: pdfmux
tools.notes: Self-hosted; confidence-scored; 0.905 on opendataloader-bench; CPU-only; free

tools.name: MinerU / MinerU-Popo
tools.notes: Academic/Research; post-processing OCR for cross-page continuity; SJTU/SHAI Lab; 4B model

tools.name: AWS Textract
tools.notes: AWS ecosystem; enterprise OCR at scale; DetectDocumentText, AnalyzeDocument APIs

tools.name: Google Document AI
tools.notes: GCP ecosystem; 200+ languages, handwriting; Gemini-powered; Layout Parser for RAG

tools.name: Azure Document Intelligence
tools.notes: Azure ecosystem; enterprise compliance; prebuilt + custom models; container on-prem

tools.name: Docsumo
tools.notes: Finance/ops; no-code document workflows; 95%+ extraction accuracy; validation rules

tools.name: Cohere Rerank
tools.notes: Cross-encoder reranking; rerank-v3.5; multilingual; high availability

tools.name: Voyage AI Rerank
tools.notes: Instruction-following reranker; rerank-2.5; agent/conversation tuned; lightweight

tools.name: ZeroEntropy zerank-1
tools.notes: Fastest latency; 60ms; 0.89 NDCG@10 healthcare; flexible licensing

tools.name: BGE Reranker v2
tools.notes: Open-source; Chinese+English; cross-encoder; widely used in Asian deployments

tools.name: Jina AI Rerank
tools.notes: Open-weight; multimodal reranker; images + PDFs; late chunking support

tools.name: Pinecone Nexus
tools.notes: New (2026); agent knowledge infrastructure; task-specific knowledge representations

tools.name: Chroma Context-1
tools.notes: New (2026); retrieval subagent; query decomposition; iterative search; context mgmt

tools.name: Weaviate Engram
tools.notes: New (2026); memory layer for agents; interaction records; topic organization; merge/delete

tools.name: Onyx (Danswer)
tools.notes: ~40+ connectors; open-source Glean alternative; self-hostable; air-gapped; Netflix, Ramp

tools.name: Glean
tools.notes: 100+ connectors; premium workplace search; $50+/user/mo; cloud-only (no true self-host)

tools.name: Microsoft Copilot / M365
tools.notes: M365 ecosystem; embedded AI across Office; $30/user add-on; requires full M365

tools.name: SphereIQ
tools.notes: Regulated industries; EU AI Act compliance wizard; self-hosted default; BYOK LLM

tools.name: PipesHub
tools.notes: Knowledge graph architecture; Google/MS connectors; on-prem + cloud; model-agnostic

tools.name: Guru
tools.notes: Curated knowledge; verified, governance-first; $15/user; real-time contextual suggestions

tools.name: GoSearch
tools.notes: Freemium; federated-first, agentic; transparent pricing; configurable LLMs

tools.name: Coveo
tools.notes: Customer-facing; ML-driven relevance; Salesforce/SAP integration; hybrid

tools.name: Algolia
tools.notes: Developer-driven; fast application search; $1.50/1K requests; not internal KB search

tools.name: Meilisearch
tools.notes: Modern hybrid; search engine + vector store; /chat API; often replaces standalone vector DB

tools.name: Typesense
tools.notes: Developer-friendly; typo-tolerant search; no native vector (as of 2026); hybrid via partners

tools.name: Neo4j
tools.notes: Knowledge graph + vectors; Cypher queries; GDS library; graph-native RAG

tools.name: Amazon Neptune
tools.notes: AWS ecosystem; RDF + property graphs; fully managed; optimized for connected data

tools.name: ArangoDB
tools.notes: Enterprise; graph + document + vector; flexible hybrid RAG; multi-model queries

tools.name: Actian VectorAI DB
tools.notes: Enterprise; offline multimodal copilot; named vectors; filtered search; hybrid RRF fusion

tools.name: KDB.AI
tools.notes: Finance/quant; unified qFlat, IVF, HNSW; quant-specific; high-throughput ingestion

tools.name: Deep Lake (Activeloop)
tools.notes: ML pipelines; tensor storage + vector search; inverted + BM25 indexes; dataset optimization

tools.name: Vectorize AI
tools.notes: Seed stage ($3.6M); unstructured → vector DB optimization; data integration for RAG

tools.name: Ollama
tools.notes: Massive adoption; on-premise; 52M monthly downloads; not for multi-tenant production

tools.name: vLLM
tools.notes: Onyx-compatible; air-gapped RAG; PagedAttention; 200+ models
